after.description: Start of the time range, matched on scheduled time. Relative ('-7d', '-24h') or ISO 8601. Defaults to -7d — bounds the ClickHouse partition scan, so widen it explicitly for older runs.

before.description: End of the time range, matched on scheduled time. Same format as 'after'. Defaults to now.

distinct_id.description: Only return invocations triggered for this distinct_id (the person the run executed for).

id.description: A UUID string identifying this hog flow.

limit.description: Maximum number of invocations to return (1-500, default 50).

status.description: Comma-separated invocation statuses to include, e.g. 'failed' or 'success,failed'.
